resources.string:
Hey you,
Are you ready for an awesome journey?
What should I call you bud
Pick your hero legend and let\'s begin the grind 🔥
One of the buttons should be enough to get you started
People make mistakes, and it\'s okay
Fool me once shame on you, fool me twice shame on me
Don\'t give up now, you got this
You’ve smashed your previous best! This card unlocks when you set a new personal high score.
A flawless victory! This card is awarded for navigating the entire challenge without a single misstep.
Just one hiccup, but perfection was in reach. Earned for completing the game with only one mistake.
A near-perfect run—twice tripped, but still standing strong. This card shows your resilience with just two errors.
Everyone stumbles now and then. This achievement reflects your persistence, even after ten mistakes.
We’ve all had rough days. This badge is a reminder that falling twenty times is just twenty chances to get back up.
Completed a quiz in under 1 minute! Speed and smarts combined!
Spent over 5 minutes in a single quiz session. You\'re in no rush—smart and steady!
Played a quiz session lasting over 10 minutes. That\'s some deep thinking!
Stayed active in one quiz for over 20 minutes. Your brain must be sweating!
You calmly solved quizzes for over 30 minutes in one go. Mental peace meets performance.
Over 45 minutes in a quiz session? Are you warping time or just that immersed?
An hour has passed and you\'re still going strong. This is quiz dedication at its finest!
Are you sure you want to start a new session? Previous session will be discarded
